info.title: DOIT Agent API - Extended
info.description: Complete API for Azure AI Agent with read and write operations for MongoDB data. IMPORTANT: Every message includes a [Context: {...}] section with user_email field. When calling write operations (createTask, assignTask, createSprint, etc.), ALWAYS extract user_email from the Context and use it as the requesting_user parameter. IMPORTANT SPRINT WORKFLOW: for active sprint detection, first call getSprints with project_id only and NO status filter, then detect active sprint case-insensitively from returned status values (active/Active/ACTIVE).

servers.description: Public tunnel to development server via ngrok

get.description: ALWAYS call this FIRST to get project list with internal project_id values. Each project has a 'name' field (human-readable) and 'project_id' field (internal MongoDB ID). When user mentions a project name, use this endpoint to find and extract the project_id field.
Retrieve tasks from MongoDB with optional filters for project, status, priority, and assignee. Use assigned_to_email parameter to filter by user email address.

parameters.name: assignee_id
parameters.description: Filter by assignee user ID (MongoDB ObjectId)

parameters.name: assigned_to_email
parameters.description: Filter by assigned user email address (recommended - easier than using user ID)

get.description: Retrieve all users (excluding sensitive information like passwords and tokens)

Retrieve sprints with optional filters for project and status. IMPORTANT: for active sprint checks, first call with project_id only and no status filter, then detect active sprint case-insensitively from returned values.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status filter. Prefer first call without this filter.

get.description: Retrieve aggregated statistics including total counts, task distributions by status and priority, users by role, and projects by status

get.summary: Get specific project details by internal ID
get.description: Get details for a specific project using its internal project_id (MongoDB ObjectId format like '507f1f77bcf86cd799439011'). NEVER use project name here - always use the project_id field from getAllProjects response.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Internal MongoDB project ID (like '507f1f77bcf86cd799439011'), NOT the project name. Get this from getAllProjects response.

get.description: Check if the agent API and database connection are healthy

post.summary: Send generated report link by email
post.description: Fallback email endpoint for Agent905. Use this when Mail_Agent/Logic App fails (for example missing 'sig' query parameter). Sends a compact link-only email via SMTP to avoid payload timeouts.

example.subject: Intern Toastmaster Report
example.message: Please find your generated report below.

post.description: Create a task with automatic assignee resolution and RBAC validation. CRITICAL WORKFLOW: 1) Extract user_email from the [Context: {...}] section in the message, 2) Call getAllProjects to get project_id from project name, 3) Use project_id (MongoDB ObjectId) in this request, 4) Use user_email as requesting_user field, 5) Optionally provide assignee_email or assignee_name. Example: If Context contains 'user_email': 'admin@doit.com', use requesting_user: 'admin@doit.com'.

requesting_user.description: Email of the user making this request (for permission validation)

project_id.description: Internal project ID from getAllProjects response (MongoDB ObjectId format like '507f1f77bcf86cd799439011'). NEVER use project name - always use project_id field.

assignee_email.description: Email of user to assign task to

assignee_name.description: Name of user to assign task to (alternative to email)

403.description: User does not have permission to create tasks

404.description: Requesting user or assignee not found

post.summary: Bulk update due dates for one or many tasks
post.description: Use this endpoint when user requests due-date updates for multiple tasks in one prompt. Supports ticket IDs (AA-003) and Mongo _id values. Also supports single-task updates (task_identifiers with one item).

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

due_date.description: Target due date (YYYY-MM-DD preferred; common natural formats also accepted)

task_identifiers.description: Task identifiers as ticket IDs (AA-003) and/or internal Mongo _id values

200.description: Bulk update completed with per-task result details

403.description: Permission denied

404.description: Requesting user or project not found

post.summary: Bulk update allowed fields for one or many tasks
post.description: Use this endpoint when the same non-sprint update payload should be applied to multiple tasks in one prompt. Supports ticket IDs (AA-003) and Mongo _id values. Allowed update fields: title, description, priority, status, assignee_id, due_date, issue_type, labels, comment. IMPORTANT: for sprint membership changes, use addTaskToSprintAutomation / bulkAddTasksToSprintAutomation for add and removeTaskFromSprintAutomation / bulkRemoveTasksFromSprintAutomation for remove; do not use this endpoint for sprint add/remove.

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

task_identifiers.description: Task identifiers as ticket IDs (AA-003) and/or internal Mongo _id values

updates.description: Shared update payload applied to each task identifier

due_date.description: Target due date (YYYY-MM-DD preferred; common natural formats also accepted)

comment.description: Optional comment to log in task activity when provided

200.description: Bulk update completed with per-task result details

400.description: Invalid update payload or unsupported fields

403.description: Permission denied

404.description: Requesting user or project not found

put.description: Assign a task to a user by email or name with RBAC validation. Requires requesting_user for permission check. Admin or Member can assign tasks.

requesting_user.description: Email of the user making this request

assignee_identifier.description: Email or name of user to assign to

403.description: User does not have permission to assign tasks

post.description: Add a single label to a task. Use this endpoint for label updates instead of embedding label text in description.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task identifier: ticket ID (AA-004) or Mongo _id

403.description: Permission denied

post.description: Add an attachment entry to a task using a URL (or data URL). Use this endpoint for attachments instead of writing attachment text into description.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task identifier: ticket ID (AA-004) or Mongo _id

403.description: Permission denied

post.description: Add a comment activity entry to the task timeline.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task identifier: ticket ID (AA-004) or Mongo _id

403.description: Permission denied

post.description: Create a relationship between tasks (blocks, blocked-by, relates-to, duplicates). Provide linked_ticket_id or linked_task_id.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Source task identifier: ticket ID (AA-004) or Mongo _id

403.description: Permission denied

post.description: Create a project with RBAC validation. Requires requesting_user email. Only Admin users can create projects.

requesting_user.description: Email of the user making this request (must be Admin)

403.description: Only Admin users can create projects

post.description: Create a sprint with RBAC validation. Requires requesting_user email from message Context.user_email. Only Admin and Super-Admin users can create sprints. ALWAYS resolve and send project_id (not project name).

requesting_user.description: Email of the user making this request (must be Admin)

403.description: Only Admin and Super-Admin users can create sprints

post.summary: Start a sprint in a project
post.description: Start a planned sprint using api_key auth with RBAC checks. Requires requesting_user from Context.user_email, project_id, and either sprint_id or sprint_name.

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

sprint_name.description: Sprint name fallback (case-insensitive match within project)

403.description: Access denied: requesting user not allowed for this project

post.summary: Complete or end a sprint in a project
post.description: Complete an active sprint using api_key auth with RBAC checks. Requires requesting_user from Context.user_email, project_id, and either sprint_id or sprint_name.

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

sprint_name.description: Sprint name fallback (case-insensitive match within project)

403.description: Access denied: requesting user not allowed for this project

post.summary: Add a task to a sprint
post.description: Add a single task to a sprint using api_key auth with RBAC checks. Requires requesting_user from Context.user_email, project_id, task_identifier, and either sprint_id or sprint_name. task_identifier supports ticket ID (AA-009) and Mongo _id. IMPORTANT: if user asks to add multiple tasks in one prompt, use bulkAddTasksToSprintAutomation.

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

task_identifier.description: Task identifier: ticket ID (AA-009) or internal Mongo _id

sprint_name.description: Sprint name fallback (case-insensitive match within project)

403.description: Access denied: requesting user not allowed for this project

404.description: Task, sprint, project, or user not found

post.summary: Add multiple tasks to a sprint
post.description: Use this endpoint when user requests adding multiple tasks to the same sprint in one prompt. Requires requesting_user from Context.user_email, project_id, task_identifiers array, and either sprint_id or sprint_name. task_identifiers supports ticket IDs (AA-009) and Mongo _id values.

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

task_identifiers.description: Task identifiers as ticket IDs (AA-009) and/or internal Mongo _id values

sprint_name.description: Sprint name fallback (case-insensitive match within project)

200.description: Bulk add tasks to sprint completed with per-task results

403.description: Access denied: requesting user not allowed for this project

404.description: Task, sprint, project, or user not found

post.summary: Remove a task from a sprint
post.description: Remove a single task from a sprint using api_key auth with RBAC checks. Requires requesting_user from Context.user_email, project_id, task_identifier, and either sprint_id or sprint_name. task_identifier supports ticket ID (AA-010) and Mongo _id. IMPORTANT: if user asks to remove multiple tasks in one prompt, use bulkRemoveTasksFromSprintAutomation.

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

task_identifier.description: Task identifier: ticket ID (AA-010) or internal Mongo _id

sprint_name.description: Sprint name fallback (case-insensitive match within project)

403.description: Access denied: requesting user not allowed for this project

404.description: Task, sprint, project, or user not found

post.summary: Remove multiple tasks from a sprint
post.description: Use this endpoint when user requests removing multiple tasks from the same sprint in one prompt. Requires requesting_user from Context.user_email, project_id, task_identifiers array, and either sprint_id or sprint_name. task_identifiers supports ticket IDs (AA-010) and Mongo _id values.

requesting_user.description: Email from Context.user_email for RBAC validation

task_identifiers.description: Task identifiers as ticket IDs (AA-010) and/or internal Mongo _id values

sprint_name.description: Sprint name fallback (case-insensitive match within project)

200.description: Bulk remove tasks from sprint completed with per-task results

403.description: Access denied: requesting user not allowed for this project

404.description: Task, sprint, project, or user not found

put.description: Update task with RBAC validation. Requires requesting_user email. Admin, Member, and Super-Admin can update tasks. task_id can be either ticket ID (e.g., AA-003) or internal Mongo _id.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task identifier: ticket ID (AA-003) or internal Mongo _id

403.description: Permission denied

delete.description: Delete task with RBAC validation. Requires requesting_user email. Only Admin users can delete tasks.

requesting_user.description: Email of the user making this request (must be Admin)

403.description: Only Admin users can delete tasks

put.description: Update task status with RBAC validation. Admin can set any status. Member can set most statuses except 'Done' (approval required).

403.description: Permission denied. Members cannot set status to 'Done'.

put.description: Update task priority with RBAC validation. Admin or Member can update priority.

403.description: Permission denied

post.description: Approve task and set status to 'Done'. Only Admin users can approve tasks.

requesting_user.description: Email of the user making this request (must be Admin)

403.description: Only Admin users can approve tasks

post.description: Add a user as a member to a project. Only Admin users can add members.

requesting_user.description: Email of the user making this request (must be Admin)

member_identifier.description: Email or name of user to add as member

403.description: Only Admin users can add project members

put.description: Update project with RBAC validation. Only Admin users can update projects.

403.description: Only Admin users can update projects

delete.description: Delete project with RBAC validation. Only Admin users can delete projects.

403.description: Only Admin users can delete projects

AgentAPIKey.name: api_key
AgentAPIKey.description: Agent service authentication key (query parameter for better Azure AI compatibility)
